LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CHONG LIN'S MOTION FOR AN AWARD OF ATTY'S FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $27,092.44. BY AN AUGUST 24, 2022 ORDER, THIS COURT AWARDED ATTORNEY FEES UNDER CORPORATIONS CODE 1604 AGAINST RESPONDENTS. PETITIONER'S SUBMISSIONS ESTABLISH THAT $27,092.44 IN FEES IS REASONABLE. AT HEARING, THE PARTIES AGREED THAT $22,000.00 IS OFFSET AGAINST THE $27,092.44. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUL-20-2023. RE: PLAINTIFF CHONG LIN'S MOTION FOR AN OSC WHY EACH RESPONDENT SHOULD NOT BE HELD IN CONTEMPT AND FOR DAMAGES. NOT ARGUED/CONTESTED. THE COURT ACKNOWLEDGES THAT THERE WAS NO INDICATION THAT ANYONE OPPOSED THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT AND COUNSEL DISCUSS THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY THE PREVAILING PARTY. UPON CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT INSTRUCTS COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING THE PROPOSED ORDER ISSUE AND RE-SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER VIA EMAIL ONCE AN AGREEMENT REGARDING THE SAME HAS BEEN REACHED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING AN ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

Motion For An Award Of Atty'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Nov-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven Sherman, Esq. (415.403.1660; steven@shermanbusinesslaw.com) for Petitioner, Chong Lin.
Roger R. Rubin, Esq. (415.441.1112; r.roger@sbcglobal.net) for Respondent, Incredible T.
Andrew Dai, Esq. (650.817.8888; adai@ahdlaws.com) for Respondent, Pinky Long via Zoom Videoconference.

ARGUED The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CHONG LIN'S Motion For An Award Of Atty'S Fees And Costs.

Petitioner's "motion for an award of attorneys' fees and costs" is granted in the amount of $27,092.44.
By an August 24, 2022 order, this court awarded attorney fees under Corporations Code 1604 against respondents. Petitioner's submissions establish that $27,092.44 in fees is reasonable. At hearing, the parties agreed that $22,000.00 is offset against the $27,092.44.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
